events.title: Tivat Night Market
events.description: Evening market along the Pine promenade with local crafts, street food, vintage stalls and live acoustic sets. Every Friday in summer.

events.title: Marina Open Day & Classic Boats Show
events.description: Free guided tours of the marina, classic wooden boats on display and sailing taster sessions for beginners run by the local yacht club.

events.title: Kids' Sailing Week — Optimist Course
events.description: Five-day beginner sailing course for children aged 7–12 in Optimist dinghies, run by certified instructors of the Tivat sailing club. All equipment provided.

events.title: Boka Bay Sprint Triathlon
events.description: Sprint-distance triathlon: 750 m swim in the bay, 20 km bike along the coastal road and a 5 km run finishing on the promenade. Relay teams welcome.

events.title: Porto Montenegro Summer Stage: Open-Air Concert
events.description: International headliner on the Porto Montenegro waterfront stage, opening the marina's summer concert series. Gates open at 19:00 with food and drink villages around the quay.

events.title: Jazz on the Quay
events.description: Late-evening jazz sessions at the marina's open-air lounge featuring a rotating line-up of regional jazz musicians. Reservations recommended.

events.title: Purgatorije Theatre Festival — Opening Night
events.description: Tivat's long-running summer theatre festival opens at the Buća-Luković summer stage with a contemporary drama production, followed by weeks of theatre, concerts and exhibitions.

events.title: Boka Gastro Fest
events.description: Two-day gastronomy festival celebrating Boka bay cuisine — seafood, Njeguši specialties and modern Montenegrin cooking, with chef demos and tastings.
